name: io.github.zoom/zoom-workspace
title: Zoom Workspace MCP Server
description: Zoom workspace server for meetings, chat, docs, recordings, and AI-generated collaboration content.

examples.name: Search meeting content
examples.description: Search meetings, chat, and docs to find summaries, transcripts, recordings, and related content.

examples.name: Review recording resources
examples.description: Retrieve recording summaries, next steps, playback links, and related meeting assets.

examples.name: Create follow-up docs
examples.description: Generate a new Zoom Doc from Markdown based on meeting notes or action items.
